title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I protect you I wonder....

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: To protect our short angry friend from the culinaromancer's magics, I suggest that you seek out his father within the mountain tunnel that he guards.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: His fondness for rock cakes could prove key in freeing him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Wow! You were incredible! The way you defeated the Culinaromancer, you made it seem so easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I don't suppose you can remember how I defeated him can you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course! Which bit can't you remember doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That dwarf... I somehow can't remember how I managed to save him...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: The dwarf? Oh, yeah, I think that was an easy one, didn't you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did? Er, I did.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: You went to see his dad in the tunnels under white wolf mountain, and then got some rock cakes, if I remember rightly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... I remember now...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Did you want a reminder on any other of your brave exploits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...son...time bubble...culinaromancer...freeze...rockcakes!

lines.speaker: An old Dwarf
lines.text: I have absolutely no clue what you are on about. Sit down, catch your breath and explain please!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. Your son, the one who guards the tunnel entrance?

lines.speaker: An old Dwarf
lines.text: Oh aye. Good lad he is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well he's at a special meeting and he's frozen by the culinaromancer!

lines.speaker: An old Dwarf
lines.text: Ok... you lost me again. I just got back from visitin' him up top, he's fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's in a TIME BUBBLE!

lines.speaker: An old Dwarf
lines.text: Oh that. No no, he's quite ok. That was last week.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need your rock cakes to free him from it.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: You're delusional. Never would old Rohak give away his special recipe, not for all the golden nectar from the Rising Sun!

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: I would never give away me special rock cake recipe, not for all the golden nectar from the Rising Sun!

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about dwarves and ale?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Erm... they like it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No no no... I mean what kind of ale do they drink?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Well I know for sure that they enjoy my special recipe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? Would you tell me?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: And lose money? I think not!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could offer you some in return, how about 100 gold?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Sorry, no deal, that wouldn't even cover my expenses.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: You have CHOCOLATE in your pack, I can smell it! 50 gold and chocolate and the secret is yours!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have a deal. Here you go...

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love, I think they're genetically attracted to gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, no deal.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Your loss! Next customer please!

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Welll... maybe... look.. I'm on duty here at the bar so I can't get anything to eat, I could murder a pizza.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just happen to have some on me.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Pizza and 100 gold and the secret is yours!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have a deal. Here you go...

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love, I think they're genetically attracted to gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, no deal.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Your loss! Next customer please!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I don't have the money on me. I'll have to come back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could offer you some in return, how about 200 gold?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: You sure you haven't got anymore?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just 200... honest!

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Hand it over then and I'll tell you the secret.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love, I think they're genetically attracted to gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could offer you some in return, how about 200 gold?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: You're a good person... for you, 150 and you have a deal.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love, I think they're genetically attracted to gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh go on, I'm really quite trustworthy once you get to know me.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love. I think they're genetically attracted to gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: What...what am I saying? I just gave you the secret!

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Tina
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about dwarves and ale?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Oh it's you again. Forgotten the secret already?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No... I just... misplaced it.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love, I think they're genetically attracted to gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I won't forg...err... misplace it, this time.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Tina
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

sections.title: Talking to Rohak with Asgoldian ale in inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here, have a drink.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Is that what I think it is?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe!

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: That's from the Rising Sun, the barmaid there will never tell me the recipe she uses. It's divine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Speaking of recipes....

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: No! I shwears I'll never tell...

sections.title: Talking to Rohak with a second Asgoldian ale in inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here, have another.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Don't mind if I do!

sections.title: Talking to Rohak with a third Asgoldian ale in inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think you deserve another pint.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Don't mind if I do!

sections.title: Talking to Rohak with a fourth Asgoldian ale in inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure another pint will go down nicely.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Don't mind if I do!

sections.title: Talking to Rohak again once he is sufficiently drunk

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Ahhh, yer me besht mate... mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a good friend Rohak, do you think you could do me a favour?

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Fer you [player]? Fer you I'd... I'd... shlide down a shlope of thishtlesh wif no 'elmet on!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't need you to do that ... friend. Just something as simple as baking me some of your wonderful rock cakes. Hmm? For your good friend?

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Fer you! Anyfin'! Fer a price of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good. I'm sure I have some gold somewhere!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much gold do you want to make the cake?

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: WHAT?! That wasn't a dream? Oh my aching head...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not a dream, you agreed to make me your special rock cake, for a fee.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: 100 gold, no less!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I should have some more money with me, he did say he'd want payment...

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Also... you'll need to get the ingredients too. Milk, flour, egg and bowl of water, mind it's a bowl and not a dirty bucket.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You didn't say I'd have to run around... but ok! Milk, flour, egg, bowl of water....I'll be back!

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Have you forgotten the ingredients list? I'll need an egg, a pot of flour, a bucket of milk and a bowl of water to make these cakes for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll see about getting them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have found some of the things you asked for:

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [I have the egg/I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens], [I have a pot of flour/I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills], [I have the bucket of milk/I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows], [I have the bowl of water!/I don't have a bowl of water].

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: That's all well and good...but come back when you have all the ingredients. You're lucky Dwarves stick to their word else I might not make these cakes for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay okay I'll get right on it! Keep your beard on!

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: What did you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: N..n...nothing honest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have all the items you asked for...is that it? I could make these!

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: No you couldn't, there's a special ingredient, but I'm not going to tell you what it is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... here's the ingredients anyway.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: There, as good as my word. Hot rock cakes to my special recipe.

sections.title: Talking to Rohak after he has made the rock cake

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Got any use out of that rock cake I made you [player]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet but I will. I'm going to save your son.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: I keep tellin you, he's fine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I appear to have lost it somewhere, can you make me another?

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: I suppose so, but you'll need all the ingredients like last time.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Have you forgotten the ingredients list? I'll need an egg, a pot of flour, a bucket of milk and a bowl of water to make these cakes for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll see about getting them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have found some of the things you asked for:

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the rock cake! But I have more ingredients, will you make me some more please?

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Oh... I suppose so. Give me the ingredients.

sections.title: Attempting to free the dwarf with a hot rock cake

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: STOP! What do you think you're doing!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: You can't feed him red hot rock cakes! You'll kill him! Find a way to cool them down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok, I'll find a way to cool them down then.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I hear there's a rather chilly reception on top of a rather icey mountain.

sections.title: Cooling the rock cake by killing an icefiend
Cooling the rock cake by wearing ice gloves

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Good work adventurer, I've teleported them away to safety! You only have [number] council members left to protect!
